problem_statement: Indy Praxis and Polk need AI enablement for community operations. CCF grant path. Two options scoped.

engagement_tracks.name: Option B: Agentic Operations Agent
engagement_tracks.description: B1: Foundation & Data Ingestion ($4K, wks 1-3). B2: Content & Comms Engine ($5K, wks 3-6). B3: Data Management & Community Assets ($4K, wks 6-10).

engagement_tracks.name: Option A: Community Matching Engine
engagement_tracks.description: A1: Matching Intelligence ($8K, wks 8-12). A2: Network Enrichment & Scale ($4K, wks 12-16).

success_signals: Greg chose Option B as priority
Brian Schutt confirmed agentic AI fits under 'tech enablement' CCF category
open_questions: If approved: project kicks off July 2026
